source: Curated from ddx-a9d130d0, the bead-lifecycle quality framework epic.

input_summary.title: EPIC: bead-lifecycle quality framework - make P7 mechanically true (lint + triage)
description_traits: aggregate scope covering lint, triage, refine, runner composition, and policy
epic itself should not be dispatched as a single implementation unit
acceptance_traits: requires child beads to cover concrete commands
does not need one Test* symbol on the epic itself

rationale.reason: epic delegates specific tests to children while requiring collective verification
epic is an aggregate container rather than a direct code-path change
epic is sufficient for decomposition, not direct execution

waivers_applied.reason: specific implementation tests live on children
no direct implementation path is expected
